'''Urup Fal'co''' was a [[Mustafarian/Legends|Mustafarian]] of the [[Mensix Mining Company]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was present in the [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] at the point where the company was suffering a small labor crisis. Many miners went on strike, and refused to talk to company representatives. Urup thus employed offworlders to convince miners to re-enter negotiations with the company.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Urup Fal'co appeared as a non-player character in the [[Star Wars video games|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1st}}
